C

category - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.IntentWedge
category is the intent category name.
CharacterProperty - com.android.device.configuration中的类
CharacterProperty is the class that implements the property of type Character.
CharacterProperty(int) - 类 的构造器com.android.device.configuration.CharacterProperty
This is the constructor of CharacterProperty.
characterSetMode - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Aztec
characterSetMode controls the character set in use for the decoded label.
CharacterSetMode - com.android.decode.configuration中的枚举
CharacterSetMode is an enumeration defining the different String encodings supported for certain symbologies of barcodes.
characterSetMode - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Datamatrix
characterSetMode controls the character set in use for the decoded label.
characterSetMode - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.DotCode
characterSetMode controls the character set in use for the decoded label.
characterSetMode - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Micropdf417
characterSetMode controls the character set in use for the decoded label.
characterSetMode - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.MicroQR
characterSetMode controls the character set in use for the decoded label.
characterSetMode - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Pdf417
characterSetMode controls the character set in use for the decoded label.
characterSetMode - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.QRCode
characterSetMode controls the character set in use for the decoded label.
checksum2Mod11 - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Msi
checksum2Mod11 allows to interpret the second check digit as module 11 instead of module 10.
clearAllMappings() - 类 中的方法com.android.device.input.KeyboardManager
Removes all the configured mappings.
clearErrors() - 类 中的静态方法com.android.device.ErrorManager
Clear and empty the internal buffer that is in charge to collect all the occurred errors.
clearErrors() - 枚举 中的方法com.android.device.ErrorManager.EMSingleton
 
clearInput - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.KeyboardWedge
 
clearMapping(VScanEntry) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.input.KeyboardManager
Removes a single active mapping.
ClipboardWedge - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
WebWedge is the class that configures the Decode Wedge capability for direct web browsing.
ClipboardWedge(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.ClipboardWedge
This is the constructor of WebWedge.
Codabar - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
Codabar is the class that configures the Codabar Symbology.
Codabar(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.Codabar
This is the constructor of Codabar.
codabar - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the Codabar barcode reading capabilities.
CODABAR_CLSI - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODABAR_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODABAR_ENABLE_CHECK - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODABAR_LENGTH1 - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODABAR_LENGTH2 - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODABAR_LENGTH_CONTROL - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODABAR_SEND_CHECK - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODABAR_SEND_START - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODABAR_USER_ID - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
Code128 - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
Code128 is the class that configures the Code128, GS1-128 and ISBT 128 Symbologies.
Code128(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.Code128
This is the constructor of Code 128.
code128 - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the Code 128, GS1-128 ISBT 128 barcode reading capabilities.
CODE128_AGGRESSIVENESS - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE128_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE128_GS1_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE128_GS1_USER_ID - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE128_LENGTH1 - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE128_LENGTH2 - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE128_LENGTH_CONTROL - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE128_SHORT_QUIET_ZONES - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE128_USER_ID - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
Code128Aggressiveness - com.android.decode.configuration中的枚举
Code128Aggressiveness is an enumeration defining the allowed aggressive mode for Code 128 barcodes.
code128Reduced - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.LinearQuietZones
code128Reduced enables the reading of Code 128 barcode labels with short quiet zones.
CODE32_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE32_USER_ID - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
Code39 - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
Code39 is the class that configures the Code39, Code32 and TriOptic Symbologies.
Code39(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.Code39
This is the constructor of Code39.
code39 - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the Code 39, Code 32 and Tri-Optic barcode reading capabilities.
CODE39_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE39_ENABLE_CHECK - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE39_FULL_ASCII - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE39_LENGTH1 - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE39_LENGTH2 - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE39_LENGTH_CONTROL - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE39_SEND_CHECK - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE39_SHORT_QUIET_ZONES - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
CODE39_USER_ID - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
code39Reduced - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.LinearQuietZones
code39Reduced enables the reading of Code 39 barcode labels with short quiet zones.

Code93 is the class that configures the Code 93 Symbology.

This is the constructor of Code93.

com.android.device.input - 程序包 com.android.device.input
 
COMMIT_ERROR - 异常错误 中的静态变量com.android.device.configuration.ConfigException
An error occurred while saving the configuration.
commitProperties() - 类 中的方法com.android.decode.BarcodeManager
Saves the configuration.
commitProperties() - 接口 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.PropertyEditor
Saves the configuration.
commonlyConcatenatedPairs - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Code128
commonlyConcatenatedPairs allow the concatenation of common concatenated pairs.
Composite - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
Composite is the class that configures the EAN.UCC Composite and GS1 Composite Symbologies.
Composite(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.Composite
This is the constructor of Composite.
composite - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the GS1 Composite barcode reading capabilities.
COMPOSITE_EAN_UPC_MODE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
COMPOSITE_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
COMPOSITE_GS1_128_MODE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
COMPOSITE_USER_ID - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
ConfigException - com.android.device.configuration中的异常错误
ConfigException is used for configuration related errors.
ConfigException() - 异常错误 的构造器com.android.device.configuration.ConfigException
Constructs a ConfigException object.
ConfigException(ConfigException) - 异常错误 的构造器com.android.device.configuration.ConfigException
Constructs a ConfigException object.
ConfigException(String) - 异常错误 的构造器com.android.device.configuration.ConfigException
Constructs a ConfigException object that takes a String parameter containing the reason the exception was thrown.
ConfigException(String, int) - 异常错误 的构造器com.android.device.configuration.ConfigException
Constructs a ConfigException object that takes a String parameter containing the reason the exception was thrown.
ConfigException(int) - 异常错误 的构造器com.android.device.configuration.ConfigException
Constructs a ConfigException object that takes a String parameter containing the reason the exception was thrown.
ConfigException(String, int[], int) - 异常错误 的构造器com.android.device.configuration.ConfigException
Constructs a ConfigException object that takes a String parameter containing the reason the exception was thrown.
convertFromNonPrintableChars(String) - 类 中的静态方法com.android.decode.BarcodeManager
 
convertToGs1_128 - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Composite
convertToGs1_128 convert the Composite label to a sequence of one or more GS1-128 barcodes.
convertToGs1_128 - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Gs1DataBar_14
convertToGs1_128 convert the Gs1DataBar_14 label to a GS1-128 barcode.
convertToGs1_128 - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Gs1DataBar_Expanded
convertToGs1_128 convert the Gs1DataBar_Expanded label to a sequence of one or more GS1-128 barcodes.
convertToGs1_128 - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Gs1DataBar_Limited
convertToGs1_128 convert the Gs1DataBar_Limited label to a GS1-128 barcode.
convertToNonPrintableChars(String) - 类 中的静态方法com.android.decode.BarcodeManager
